items.title: Why AI Image Generation Should Be Async
items.description:
AI image generation can look like a simple request-response feature.

A user enters a prompt, clicks generate, and waits for an image.

For a prototype, that can work. For a production product, it usually becomes fragile.

items.title: The Prometheus label that blew our monitoring bill out 6x
items.description: TL;DR: Our metrics bill went 6x in a single month. Traffic was flat. One Prometheus label carrying per-build IDs spawned millions of time series, and the backend charges by active series. Here's how we caught it and the label rules we run now so it doesn't happen again.

items.description:
Every developer knows the pain of running a security scan. You wait for it to finish, only to be handed a giant report filled with hundreds of warnings. You then have to spend the next three hours manually testing each one, only to find out that almost all of them are false positives.

items.title: 📄Paper: RORA-VLM: Robust Retrieval Augmentation for Vision Language Models
items.description:
Public At
International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2025

💡 Why I read this
最近在找論文的 idea 剛好找到這篇，發表在 ICLR 2025，不過被 Reject 了有點可惜
這篇主要是把 RAG 應用到 VLM ，讓模型在回答問題時可以利用外部知識
在很多 VQA 的任務中，答案其實不在圖片裡面，而是需要額外的背景知識
